name: Incus daemon + OCI/VM support
description: Installs the full Incus daemon (incusd) and client from the zabbly daily channel, plus QEMU for VM support and distrobuilder for image building. The daemon requires CAP_SYS_ADMIN + CAP_NET_ADMIN (privileged runner). On restricted runners only the client and helpers are installed. Supports OCI images (docker: / oci: remotes), system containers, and VMs (with /dev/kvm or QEMU TCG fallback).

version.description: Incus version channel: 'latest' installs the full daemon from zabbly daily. 'client-only' installs only the CLI from zabbly stable.

install_qemu.description: Install QEMU system emulator for VM support. Incus uses /dev/kvm when available, falls back to QEMU TCG (software emulation) otherwise.

remote.description: Default Incus remote name to configure (e.g. 'my-server'). Leave blank to skip remote setup.

remote_url.description: URL of the default Incus remote (e.g. 'https://incus.example.com:8443'). Required if 'remote' is set.
